case_title: MARK BORSUK RESPONDENT VS. ENZO SPACCIA APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT SPACCIA, ENZO AS TO RESPONDENT BORSUK, MARK HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 819258
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2007 - JUDGMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-28-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-07 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES P. FLEMING

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BORSUK, MARK RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SPACCIA, ENZO $1,914.26 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,173.26, *THE COURT FINDS APPELLANT RESPONSIBLE FOR ALL UNREIMBURSED COSTS OF REPAIR, INCLUDING $1888.26 UNREIMBURSED FLOOR REPAIR COSTS AND $26.00 UNREIMBURSED DRY CLEANING EXPENSE. ATTORNEY'S FEES AWARDED UNDER CCP116.780. APPEAL WAS NOT TAKEN IN BAD FAITH AS REQUIRED FOR ANY FURTHER AWARD UNDER CCP116.790, WHICH IS THEREFORE DENIED; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
